notes: Persistent gesture feed on the dashboard — always visible between the landing card and the Advanced expander. Shows the last 5 gestures the firmware recognized (raw gid like 'h+1c' on top of the friendly label) so you can tell at a glance whether 'tap + hold + tap' got heard as h+1c or got swallowed as 2c without needing the serial monitor. Chips age out after 60s; tap 'clear' to reset. Hold calibration (T_HOLD=500ms, T_LONG_HOLD=1500ms) is unchanged — it's the bench-tuned value.
